tasks.title: ProjectForm UX dates
tasks.description: Dates start/deadline same row on desktop, default start_date=today, calculated duration display, visible calendar icon on dark theme

tasks.title: ProjectDetail loading vs not-found + hero consistency
tasks.description: Add notFound state. Always render 3 hero items (Budget/Deadline/Start) with em-dash placeholder. CSS hero-item flex 1 1 0 min-width 120px

tasks.title: ProjectFilters thumbnail toggle
tasks.description: Modify setFilter to delete key when value===undefined. Fixes thumbnail_included toggle off

tasks.title: fetchMyProjects compute application_count
tasks.description: Use PostgREST sub-select contact_requests!project_id(id, status), enrich each project with application_count = pending count

tasks.title: ChatView header shows project title for editor
tasks.description: Fetch project title when request.project_id present, display in header for editor role with fallback to creator_name

tasks.title: OfferForm prefill budget_min + safe init
tasks.description: Prefill budget with data.budget_min when budget_fixed null. useEffect to call loadRequests if request undefined and activeRequestId present

tasks.title: CollabTracker offer pending state + cancel + end project button
tasks.description: ChatView passes latest non-cancelled offer (any status) to tracker. Tracker offer_sent step shows Modify(disabled)/Cancel for sender. Feedback step shows 'End project' button for creator after review submitted

tasks.title: Add cancelOffer + closeProject to CollabContext, expose via hooks
tasks.description: cancelOffer(offerId): UPDATE offers status=cancelled + notify receiver. closeProject(request, offer): UPDATE projects status=completed if project_id, notify both parties. Expose in useCollab

tasks.title: Re-seed DB with valid keys
tasks.description: UPDATE projects + offers SET content_format/mission_type/experience_level/niches/deliverables to use option keys from src/constants/options.js

excluded.title: Edit offer (modify) UI (CHAT3)
excluded.reason: Documented in plans/PLAN_PHASE2.md — only Cancel implemented in T008
